summary.lv: DUND meklē Robotikas inženieri ar 5+ gadu pieredzi darbā ar industriālajiem robotiem (KUKA, ABB) un programmēšanas prasmēm Python, Rust un C++. Hibrīds darbs, atalgojums €3200–4500 mēnesī.
summary.en: DUND is seeking a Robotics Engineer with 5+ years of experience with industrial robots (KUKA, ABB) and programming skills in Python, Rust, and C++, offering a hybrid role with €3,200–4,500/month.
